text.value:
The search for "Readme" in the Azure REST API specifications repository returned many results, indicating that there are numerous README files throughout various components of the repository. Some of these files provide documentation on specific services or tools, and others are related to scripts and helper functions.

Here are a few examples of the README files found:

1. **lint-diff README**: [See file](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md)  
   Location: `eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md`
   - This README might describe linting tools used for comparing differences in code.

2. **App Data-plane README**: [See file](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/app/data-plane/readme.md)  
   Location: `specification/app/data-plane/readme.md`
   - Likely explains the API specifications related to application data plane operations.

3. **NGINX Resource Manager README**: [See file](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/nginx/resource-manager/readme.md)  
   Location: `specification/nginx/resource-manager/readme.md`
   - Possibly includes information about managing NGINX resources through Azure APIs.

4. **Cognitive Services Anomaly Detector README**: [See file](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/cognitiveservices/data-plane/AnomalyDetector/readme.md)  
   Location: `specification/cognitiveservices/data-plane/AnomalyDetector/readme.md`
   - Provides details on the anomaly detection capabilities of Azure's cognitive services.

Each of these README files will contain detailed instructions, usage guidelines, and specifications for various Azure services or tools, depending on the API or aspect they cover.
Please summarize the Azure REST API specifications Readme
